mentions.note: Collaboration software, down 33% in 2025; proxy for enterprise software sector; AI writing code erodes value of collaboration platforms. Charge-per-user model pressured if AI boosts efficiency. In AI crosshairs. Go to Salesforce instead.
Enterprise software multiple compression on AI disruption fears; no earnings misses; psychological selling driving rotation to storage plays.
Developer/collaboration software provider caught in broad enterprise software selloff; once could do no wrong, now facing valuation compression.

Team collaboration for developers, down 70%; 30% earnings growth, 20x P/E despite beat-and-raise; wall street ignored due to R&D concerns—absurdly cheap unless business falls off cliff; AI threat likely long-term, not immediate.

Collaboration for software developers (AI threat to coding jobs); down 70% from high; beat/raise quarter; 30% earnings growth, 20x 2026; absurdly cheap unless cliff-drop imminent; AI long-term threat not immediate.
Huge rally in software rebound trade. Has been horrendous performer, but today's spike is program-driven mechanical buying, not fundamental improvement.
Collaboration and development platform at risk as AI agents handle more development tasks (coding, testing, documentation) autonomously.

Collaboration software for developers down 58% Q1 (worst Nasdaq 100 performer); ground zero for AI code-writing displacement fears; software developers may not need to collaborate if using Claude; despite strong Feb quarter, sellers convinced damage coming. Cramer won't bet against displacement here—too risky.
Stunning strength as software sector recovers from recent weakness; magnificent performance after month of punishment suggests sector inflection point.
